paper_title: Inferred Title from Materials and Methods

methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing sediment samples from fossiliferous sites for analysis of anterior and lateral teeth.

steps.description: The specimens herein described were collected through sediment sampling at three fossiliferous sites-called 'Lomas del Sauce' (LdS), 'Los Clarines' (LCIV), and 'Quebrada Camarones' (QCT).
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from specified fossiliferous sites

steps.description: Subsequent sieving using meshes with 6, 3, and 2 mm openings.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediment samples using specified mesh sizes

methods.description: Procedure for determining the taxonomy of collected specimens using illustrated descriptions.

steps.description: Taxonomic determination of the material were achieved by following the illustrated descriptions provided by Taylor (1972), Reif (1976) Froese and Pauly, 2018; OBIS, 2018).

methods.description: Collection of sea surface temperature data for areas of occurrence of the taxa using mapping parameters.

steps.description: Sea surface temperatures (SST) in areas of occurrence of these taxa have been obtained by registering the mapping parameters provided by Kaschner et al. (2016) for each species.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain sea surface temperature data using mapping parameters
